name: Data & AI Audit
subtitle: Frame. Prioritize. Decide.
description: Ideal for companies that want to structure their data / AI strategy before investing in a larger initiative.
features: Review of your current data, tools, workflows and usage
Identification of high-impact data / AI opportunities
Use case prioritization based on ROI, feasibility and risk
Technical and organizational recommendations
Clear action plan with quick wins and longer-term initiatives

name: AI MVP
subtitle: A first version that actually works.
description: Designed to launch a concrete use case quickly with a solid, demonstrable and usable foundation.
features: Modeling, agent design or automation for a focused use case
GPT API integration and tool calling
Minimum viable pipeline from data to inference
Basic monitoring, logs and initial supervision
Documentation and handover to internal teams

name: Continuous Delivery
subtitle: Deploy your product or service at scale.
description: Built for teams moving from a validated prototype to a robust, production-ready AI service.
features: Production-grade MLOps and LLMOps
On-premise or cloud deployment
Operational, monitored AI service
Security, observability and runtime stability
Progressive scale-up and delivery support

name: Custom Data & AI Projects
subtitle: From strategy to production.
description: For companies looking to design, build and deploy robust and measurable data / AI systems.
features: Use case design and scoping
Data engineering, architecture, pipelines, orchestration and governance
ML / AI models, including classical ML and LLM systems
Production deployment and industrialization
Team enablement and knowledge transfer
